name: Chicken Marabella
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and finely puree the garlic.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except brown sugar, white wine, and parsley.
3. Cover and let marinate in the fridge overnight.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Arrange chicken in a single layer in shallow baking pans.
6. Spoon marinade over the chicken.
7. Sprinkle chicken pieces with brown sugar.
8. Pour white wine around the chicken.
9. Bake for 50 minutes to 1 hour, basting frequently with pan juices.
10. Serve with noodles or rice.
11. Sprinkle with parsley.
12. Serve sauce (remaining juices) on the side.
